name: grok
description: Use a local Grok Build CLI from Claude Code for questions, reviews, and bounded rescue tasks.

default_model.title: Default Grok model
default_model.description: Model name passed to Grok when a command does not specify --model.

api_fallback_enabled.title: Enable xAI API fallback
api_fallback_enabled.description: Reserved for a future read-only API fallback. This MVP only invokes the local Grok CLI.
